options.name: --recursive
options.description:
(Default: false) Recursively search the current
directory for csproj files and apply the given version
to all files found. Mutually exclusive to the
csprojFile argument.

options.name: --prefix
options.description:
(Default: false) Set version using the VersionPrefix
element for csproj files.

arguments.name: VERSION
arguments.description:
The version to apply to the given csproj
file(s). A filename can also be referenced by
prepending an @filename to read the version number from
the file.The file is expected to contain either a
simple version or a JSON value in the following
format:{Version: {Major:Value, Minor:Value,
Patch:Value}}

arguments.name: CSPROJFILE
arguments.description:
Path to a csproj file to apply the given version.
Mutually exclusive to the --recursive option.
